title: pseudoselago prolixa
intro: Pseudoselago prolixa, also known as the Cape alkanet, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of Pseudoselago prolixa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea infusions or as a dried herb, and its roots and leaves are also used in various remedies.
